headline: How Is Lam Research’s Stock Performance Compared to Other Semiconductor Stocks?
summary: Having substantially outpaced its semiconductor peers over the past year, Lam Research continues to command strong analyst confidence, with sentiment toward the stock remaining decidedly bullish.
